title: aquilegia vulgaris var. subalpina
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris var. subalpina, also known as the alpine columbine or alpine aquilegia, is a perennial flowering plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris var. subalpina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
